## Page 275 # **Template Annex II Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2021/2178** ## Page 275 of 6 July 2021 ## Page 275 Image /page/274/Figure/2 description: This image shows a table of contents. The first entry is "Chairman and CEO's statement", followed by "2023 highlights", "Ready for change", "Record earnings", "Common responsibility, shared benefits", "Our response to the environmental challenge", "Responsible management", "About this report", and "Data tables". The entries are numbered 1 through 6. ## Page 275 Image /page/274/Picture/6 description: The image shows the logo for CIE Automotive. The logo consists of a stylized letter "C" on the left, followed by the text "CIE Automotive" on the right. The "C" is formed by two curved black shapes that do not quite meet, creating an incomplete circle. The text "CIE Automotive" is in a simple, sans-serif font, with "CIE" in a bolder typeface than "Automotive". The entire logo is in black against a white background. ## Page 275 Image /page/274/Picture/0 description: The image shows the words "ANNUAL REPORT" stacked on top of each other on the left side of the image. To the right of the words is a large number "23" with a quotation mark above the "2". ## Page 276 # TURNOVER ## Page 276 | | Circular

The sixth topic is "Our response to the environmental challenge" and is labeled with the number 5. The seventh topic is "Responsible management" and is labeled with the number 6. The eighth topic is "About this report". The ninth topic is "Data tables". ## Page 279 Image /page/278/Picture/5 description: The image shows the CIE Automotive logo. The logo consists of a stylized letter C on the left and the words "CIE Automotive" on the right. The letter C is made up of two curved lines that do not quite meet, creating a gap in the middle.
